message.content:
{
  "page_type": "parameter_table",
  "summary": "This is a blank data recording table from an HVAC manual, specifically Appendix 3: User On-site Operation Data Record Sheet. It is designed for logging operational parameters of a chiller unit over time, with sections for chilled water, cooling water, refrigerant circuit A, refrigerant circuit B, and electrical data.",
  "visual_entities": [
    {"type": "table", "label": "User On-site Operation Data Record Sheet"},
    {"type": "section", "label": "Chilled Water"},
    {"type": "section", "label": "Cooling Water"},
    {"type": "section", "label": "Refrigerant Circuit A"},
    {"type": "section", "label": "Refrigerant Circuit B"},

    {"type": "field", "label": "Time"},

    {"type": "field", "label": "Outlet Temperature (°C)"},
    {"type": "field", "label": "Current Capacity (%)"},
    {"type": "field", "label": "Discharge Pressure (kPa)"},
    {"type": "field", "label": "Suction Pressure (kPa)"},
    {"type": "field", "label": "Oil Pressure Difference A1 (kPa)"},
    {"type": "field", "label": "Oil Pressure Difference A2 (kPa)"},
    {"type": "field", "label": "Suction Temperature (°C)"},
    {"type": "field", "label": "Discharge Temperature (°C)"},
    {"type": "field", "label": "Motor Temperature A1 (°C)"},
    {"type": "field", "label": "Motor Temperature A2 (°C)"},
    {"type": "field", "label": "Superheat (°C)"},
    {"type": "field", "label": "EXV Opening (%)"},
    {"type": "field", "label": "Motor Temperature B1 (°C)"},
    {"type": "field", "label": "Motor Temperature B2 (°C)"},
    {"type": "field", "label": "Voltage (V)"},
    {"type": "field", "label": "Current 1 (A)"},
    {"type": "field", "label": "Current 2 (A)"},
    {"type": "field", "label": "Current 3 (A)"},
    {"type": "field", "label": "Power (W)"}
  ],
  "visual_relationships": [
    {"from": "Chilled Water", "relation": "contains", "to": "Inlet Pressure (MPa)"},
    {"from": "Chilled Water", "relation": "contains", "to": "Outlet Pressure (MPa)"},

    {"from": "Chilled Water", "relation": "contains", "to": "Outlet Temperature (°C)"},

    {"from": "Cooling Water", "relation": "contains", "to": "Outlet Pressure (MPa)"},
    {"from": "Cooling Water", "relation": "contains", "to": "Inlet Temperature (°C)"},
    {"from": "Cooling Water", "relation": "contains", "to": "Outlet Temperature (°C)"},
    {"from": "Refrigerant Circuit A", "relation": "contains", "to": "Current Capacity (%)"},
    {"from": "Refrigerant Circuit A", "relation": "contains", "to": "Discharge Pressure (kPa)"},
    {"from": "Refrigerant Circuit A", "relation": "contains", "to": "Suction Pressure (kPa)"},
    {"from": "Refrigerant Circuit A", "relation": "contains", "to": "Oil Pressure Difference A1 (kPa)"},
    {"from": "Refrigerant Circuit A", "relation": "contains", "to": "Oil Pressure Difference A2 (kPa)"},
    {"from": "Refrigerant Circuit A", "relation": "contains", "to": "Suction Temperature (°C)"},
    {"from": "Refrigerant Circuit A", "relation": "contains", "to": "Discharge Temperature (°C)"},
    {"from": "Refrigerant Circuit A", "relation": "contains", "to": "Motor Temperature A1 (°C)"},
    {"from": "Refrigerant Circuit A", "relation": "contains", "to": "Motor Temperature A2 (°C)"},
    {"from": "Refrigerant Circuit A", "relation": "contains", "to": "Superheat (°C)"},
    {"from": "Refrigerant Circuit A", "relation": "contains", "to": "EXV Opening (%)"},
    {"from": "Refrigerant Circuit B", "relation": "contains", "to": "Current Capacity (%)"},
    {"from": "Refrigerant Circuit B", "relation": "contains", "to": "Discharge Pressure (kPa)"},
    {"from": "Refrigerant Circuit B", "relation": "contains", "to": "Suction Pressure (kPa)"},
    {"from": "Refrigerant Circuit B", "relation": "contains", "to": "Oil Pressure Difference A1 (kPa)"},
    {"from": "Refrigerant Circuit B", "relation": "contains", "to": "Oil Pressure Difference A2 (kPa)"},
    {"from": "Refrigerant Circuit B", "relation": "contains", "to": "Suction Temperature (°C)"},
    {"from": "Refrigerant Circuit B", "relation": "contains", "to": "Discharge Temperature (°C)"},
    {"from": "Refrigerant Circuit B", "relation": "contains", "to": "Motor Temperature B1 (°C)"},
    {"from": "Refrigerant Circuit B", "relation": "contains", "to": "Motor Temperature B2 (°C)"},
    {"from": "Refrigerant Circuit B", "relation": "contains", "to": "Superheat (°C)"},
    {"from": "Refrigerant Circuit B", "relation": "contains", "to": "EXV Opening (%)"},
    {"from": "Electrical Data", "relation": "contains", "to": "Voltage (V)"},
    {"from": "Electrical Data", "relation": "contains", "to": "Current 1 (A)"},
    {"from": "Electrical Data", "relation": "contains", "to": "Current 2 (A)"},
    {"from": "Electrical Data", "relation": "contains", "to": "Current 3 (A)"},
    {"from": "Electrical Data", "relation": "contains", "to": "Power (W)"}
  ],
  "useful_for_knowledge_types": ["operational_parameters", "data_logging", "system_monitoring", "maintenance_records"],
  "ocr_text_if_useful": "30HXC 开机、运行维护手册\n上海一冷开利空调设备有限公司\n附录三 用户现场运行数据记录表\n机组型号：\n机组出厂编号：\n日期：\n时间\n冷水\n进水压力(MPa)\n出水压力 M(Pa)\n进水温度(℃)\n出水温度(℃)\n冷却水\n进水压力(MPa)\n出水压力(Mpa)\n进水温度(℃)\n出水温度(℃)\n回路A\n现有能量(%)\n排气压力(kPa)\n吸气压力(kPa)\n油压差 A1(kPa)\n油压差 A2(kPa)\n吸气温度(℃)\n排气温度(℃)\n电机温度 A1(℃)\n电机温度 A2(℃)\n过热度(℃)\nEXV 开度(%)\n回路B\n现有能量(%)\n排气压力(Kpa)\n吸气压力(kPa)\n油压差 A1(kPa)\n油压差 A2(kPa)\n吸气温度(℃)\n排气温度(℃)\n电机温度 B1(℃)\n电机温度 B2(℃)\n过热度(℃)\nEXV 开度(%)\n电气数据\n电压(V)\n电流 1 (A)\n电流 2 (A)\n电流 3 (A)\n功率(W)\n69\n制冷百家网整理：www.zhilengbj.cn",
  "uncertainty_notes": "The table is blank, so no specific data values or operational states are visible. The relationships are based solely on the table's hierarchical structure (sections containing rows). The exact unit for 'Outlet Pressure' in the Chilled Water section is written as 'M(Pa)' which may be a typo for 'MPa'.",
  "confidence": 0.95
}

parsed.summary: This is a blank data recording table from an HVAC manual, specifically Appendix 3: User On-site Operation Data Record Sheet. It is designed for logging operational parameters of a chiller unit over time, with sections for chilled water, cooling water, refrigerant circuit A, refrigerant circuit B, and electrical data.

visual_entities.label: User On-site Operation Data Record Sheet

parsed.ocr_text_if_useful:
30HXC 开机、运行维护手册
上海一冷开利空调设备有限公司
附录三 用户现场运行数据记录表
机组型号：
机组出厂编号：
日期：
时间
冷水
进水压力(MPa)
出水压力 M(Pa)
进水温度(℃)
出水温度(℃)
冷却水
进水压力(MPa)
出水压力(Mpa)
进水温度(℃)
出水温度(℃)
回路A
现有能量(%)
排气压力(kPa)
吸气压力(kPa)
油压差 A1(kPa)
油压差 A2(kPa)
吸气温度(℃)
排气温度(℃)
电机温度 A1(℃)
电机温度 A2(℃)
过热度(℃)
EXV 开度(%)
回路B
现有能量(%)
排气压力(Kpa)
吸气压力(kPa)
油压差 A1(kPa)
油压差 A2(kPa)
吸气温度(℃)
排气温度(℃)
电机温度 B1(℃)
电机温度 B2(℃)
过热度(℃)
EXV 开度(%)
电气数据
电压(V)
电流 1 (A)
电流 2 (A)
电流 3 (A)
功率(W)
69
制冷百家网整理：www.zhilengbj.cn
parsed.uncertainty_notes: The table is blank, so no specific data values or operational states are visible. The relationships are based solely on the table's hierarchical structure (sections containing rows). The exact unit for 'Outlet Pressure' in the Chilled Water section is written as 'M(Pa)' which may be a typo for 'MPa'.
